outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Mixed GEX profile with 0DTE positive (+0.90B) but WEEKLY/MONTHLY deeply negative (-4.87B combined). High 0DTE call volume in 658-663 zone indicates active positioning. Expect volatility amplification on directional breaks.
outlook.summary: Spot 655.41 is trapped between 0DTE Max Pain (654) and Gamma Flip (658). Massive put positioning in MONTHLY (PCR 3.92, bearish smirk) conflicts with intense 0DTE call activity (VOL/OI >30x in 658-663). 670 is a RESONANCE level across all expiries. Dealers will defend 658-660 zone; break above targets 670, break below 654 targets 645-640 CONFLUENCE supports.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Significant CALL OI in ALL 3 expiries (0DTE: 21,952 | WEEKLY: 14,553 | MONTHLY: 12,835). Major structural resistance - dealers hedging creates selling pressure.
0DTE Gamma Flip: Critical inflection where cumulative GEX changes sign. Break above triggers dealer short-covering, amplifying upside. High volume confirms active positioning.
0DTE Max Pain only 0.2% from spot. MM target zone - gravitational pull active. Options expire worthless here, maximizing dealer profits.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE PUT WALL (16,849 OI) + WEEKLY significant (37,401 OI). High volume (71,960) confirms activity. First major support below spot.
CONFLUENCE: Massive PUT OI in WEEKLY (125,383) + MONTHLY (102,280). Both are respective PUT WALLS. Institutional support zone - strongest support level.
WEEKLY Max Pain + high OI both sides (CALL 33,784 / PUT 29,128). Pinning zone. Heavy dealer delta hedging creates price friction.
CONFLUENCE: Deep support in WEEKLY (118,614) + MONTHLY (32,461). Extreme put positioning indicates institutional tail-risk hedging.
MONTHLY CALL WALL (15,771 OI). Ultimate resistance for medium-term. Bearish smirk skew (1.29) confirms calls are cheap - limited upside expected.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday volatility from positive 0DTE gamma; underlying tension from weekly/monthly short gamma exposure. Directional break likely if gamma flip fails.
outlook.summary: Extreme put accumulation (PCR 3.74 monthly) with bearish skew across all expiries indicates heavy hedging. Spot hovers near 0DTE gamma flip (6632) with Max Pain at 6600 acting as magnetic attractor. Dealers long 0DTE gamma will suppress volatility, but negative weekly/monthly GEX creates latent instability. Expect price gravitation toward 6600 Max Pain zone.

RESONANCE: Dominant CALL OI in all expiries (15K 0DTE, 19K monthly). Primary upside resistance. Dealers sell calls here, creating structural ceiling.
RESONANCE: Massive PUT OI concentration (22K 0DTE, 22K monthly). Deep structural support. Unusual volume (11K) confirms institutional hedging.
0DTE gamma equilibrium point just below spot (6650). Critical decision zone - break below triggers dealer selling, hold supports stability. High probability inflection.
RESONANCE: Mixed positioning - CALL OI (6K 0DTE, 6K weekly) vs PUT OI (19K monthly). Near Weekly Max Pain (6705). Creates choppy price action.
RESONANCE: Significant PUT OI (25K monthly, 6K weekly). High 0DTE volume (49K) indicates active hedging. Secondary support between spot and Max Pain.
